understood_request: Identify the top 10 vendors by total money spent, showing each vendor's name, total spend (sum of purchase order total_due), and number of distinct purchase orders. Requires linking hub_vendor to hub_purchase_order via a new lnk_purchase_order_vendor, then aggregating spend and PO count per vendor.

vault.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lnk_purchase_order_vendor (
  purchase_order_vendor_hk VARCHAR(32) PRIMARY KEY,
  purchase_order_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  vendor_hk VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL,
  load_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  record_source VARCHAR NOT NULL
)
vault.load_sql:
INSERT INTO lnk_purchase_order_vendor
SELECT DISTINCT
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.vendor_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS purchase_order_vendor_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS purchase_order_hk,
  md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.vendor_id AS VARCHAR)))) AS vendor_hk,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS load_dts,
  'procurement.purchase_orders' AS record_source
FROM stg_procurement_purchase_orders s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM lnk_purchase_order_vendor l
  WHERE l.purchase_order_vendor_hk = md5(UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.po_id AS VARCHAR))) || '|' || UPPER(TRIM(CAST(s.vendor_id AS VARCHAR))))
)

mart.ddl:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_top10_vendors_by_spend (
  vendor_bk VARCHAR NOT NULL,
  vendor_name VARCHAR,
  credit_rating BIGINT,
  is_preferred BOOLEAN,
  po_count BIGINT,
  total_spend DOUBLE,
  mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_top10_vendors_by_spend; INSERT INTO mart_top10_vendors_by_spend SELECT hv.vendor_bk, svd.vendor_name, svd.credit_rating, svd.is_preferred, COUNT(DISTINCT hpo.purchase_order_hk) AS po_count, SUM(spod.total_due) AS total_spend, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM hub_vendor hv INNER JOIN sat_vendor_details svd ON hv.vendor_hk = svd.vendor_hk AND svd.load_end_dts IS NULL INNER JOIN lnk_purchase_order_vendor lpov ON hv.vendor_hk = lpov.vendor_hk INNER JOIN hub_purchase_order hpo ON lpov.purchase_order_hk = hpo.purchase_order_hk INNER JOIN sat_purchase_order_details spod ON hpo.purchase_order_hk = spod.purchase_order_hk AND spod.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY hv.vendor_bk, svd.vendor_name, svd.credit_rating, svd.is_preferred ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 10
